data.title: 'Not A Lot Of People Are Going To Stand Up To Him. I Don't Care,' Says Billionaire Mark Cuban On Why He's Not Afraid To Call Out Elon Musk
Jeff Bezos Wants To Know Who You'd Pick As The Next 007 As James Bond's Future Now In Amazon's Hands
data.description: Amazon MGM Studios has taken over the creative control of the James Bond franchise, marking a major shift for the legendary spy series, while Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has fueled speculation about the next 007 by asking fans for their picks.

data.title: Mortgage Rates Fall For Fifth Week Straight, But Remain Close To 7%
data.description: Homebuyers received some good news this week: Mortgage rates declined for a fifth week to their lowest level since last year and the median U.S. home-sale price rose by the smallest increase since last September.

data.title: Bitcoin Breaches $98K, Ethereum, Dogecoin Flat As SEC Relaxes Crypto Enforcement: Top Analysts Are Focused On This Level For A Potential BTC Upside
data.description: Leading coins jogged while stocks sank on Thursday as the Securities and Exchange Commission scaled back cryptocurrency oversight.

data.title: Alibaba CFO Toby Xu Touts 5% Drop In Share Count Thanks To Aggressive Buybacks As Jack Ma-Founded Company Basks In Stellar Q3 Results
data.description: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. has achieved a significant 5% reduction in share count over the past nine months through aggressive buyback initiatives, demonstrating strong capital return commitment amid robust financial performance.
